typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Fix remains doc/script-scoped: required flow-report checks are still not enforced inside validator runtime finalization, so validator success can occur without guaranteed report persistence.
Carried forward from round 2: no new fix feature in this rerun addressed missing machine-auditable implementation SHA linkage for compile-drift scope traceability.
Carried forward from round 2: no new fix feature in this rerun addressed malformed/non-resolvable handoff commit linkage for xcresulttool modernization traceability.
